query:
SELECT
                cps.subscription_id as id,
                p.product_id,
                p.name as product_name,
                p.product_code,
                cps.status,
                cps.created_at
            FROM "ob-poc".cbu_product_subscriptions cps
            JOIN "ob-poc".products p ON p.product_id = cps.product_id
            WHERE cps.cbu_id = $1
              AND cps.status = 'ACTIVE'
            ORDER BY p.name
